name: Infernium
lore:
Infernium forms deep beneath the earth's crust, where volcanic activity meets rich uranium deposits, creating a rare and potent hybrid.

Due to its unique composition, Infernium emits a low level of radiation combined with intense heat, making it a source of both energy and danger.

name: Radfrost
lore:
The Radfrost is known for it's enigmatic presence in high-altitude regions, 
            where it has been an object of myth and legend among local tribes. Combining 
            the raw energy of Uranium with the elusive nature of The Yeti, Radfrost are 
            both a source of fear and fascination, as their radioactive aura is said to 
            influence the surrounding environment
